notice: Config-bearing artifact surfaces keep headers, mode switches, and layer stacks honest: every header names the source object, artifact class, canonical writable source note, target context, validator state, and active mode; every source/effective/live switch states when it was resolved, which boundary it targets, whether it is writable or inspect-only, and whether it is current, stale, unresolved, deferred, or unsupported; environment-bearing artifacts keep layer order, source class, tracked or ignored state, policy locks, secret-bearing notes, and reset/open-source actions visible without leaving the IDE; and shell, CLI inspect, docs/help, and support export reuse the same mode and layer vocabulary instead of inventing surface-local copy.

header_vocabulary.label: File identity
header_vocabulary.description: Stable file or artifact identity shown in the header before any edit or inspect action.

header_vocabulary.label: Artifact class
header_vocabulary.description: Human-readable class label so users can tell whether they are editing a request env, runtime manifest, policy bundle, or another governed artifact.

header_vocabulary.label: Canonical source
header_vocabulary.description: Explicit note naming the only writable canonical source so effective or live views never masquerade as round-trip-safe text.

header_vocabulary.label: Target context
header_vocabulary.description: Visible boundary label naming the workspace, runtime, mirror, or policy scope the current mode resolves against.

header_vocabulary.label: Validator state
header_vocabulary.description: Schema or validator state carried next to the identity so stale or unresolved views stay labeled.

header_vocabulary.label: Active mode
header_vocabulary.description: The currently selected source/effective/live projection repeated in the header for cross-surface parity.

mode_vocabulary.label: Source
mode_vocabulary.description: Canonical authored source object. This is the only mode that may be writable as canonical text.

mode_vocabulary.label: Effective
mode_vocabulary.description: Resolved projection after imports, defaults, policy, secrets, and runtime discovery. It is inspect-only unless promoted back through the source object.

mode_vocabulary.label: Live
mode_vocabulary.description: Observed runtime or mirrored target state. It is never treated as canonical writable text and stays labeled when stale, unresolved, or deferred.

layer_vocabulary.label: Layer order
layer_vocabulary.description: Visible precedence order for the environment or runtime stack.

layer_vocabulary.label: Source class
layer_vocabulary.description: Stable source class such as workspace source, policy bundle, user override, or runtime discovery.

layer_vocabulary.label: Tracked state
layer_vocabulary.description: Whether the layer is tracked, ignored, or derived read-only.

layer_vocabulary.label: Policy lock
layer_vocabulary.description: Whether policy leaves the layer alone, narrows it, or locks it.

layer_vocabulary.label: Secret note
layer_vocabulary.description: Disclosure that a layer carries secret handles, redacted placeholders, or no secrets.

layer_vocabulary.label: Reset action
layer_vocabulary.description: Layer-specific reset or remove-override action that does not require leaving the IDE.

layer_vocabulary.label: Open source action
layer_vocabulary.description: Direct jump back to the source object that contributed the layer.

header.canonical_source_note: Edit the request document or environment set source; effective and live views are inspect-only.
header.validator_summary: Schema snapshot current; environment and auth inspectors resolved.

mode_switches.summary: Canonical request and environment source stays writable.
Resolved request values include policy, secret handles, and ad hoc overrides.

mode_switches.resolution_time_label: Live bind deferred until next send
mode_switches.summary: Observed runtime values are deferred until the request is dispatched.

environment_layer_stack.summary: Environment layers stay visible from the request editor and send inspector.

layers.secret_bearing_note: No secret material on this layer.

reset_action.action_label: Reset workspace defaults

layers.secret_bearing_note: No secret material on this layer.

reset_action.action_label: Reset imported profile fallback

layers.secret_bearing_note: No secret material on this layer.

reset_action.action_label: Inspect reset limits for policy egress overlay

layers.secret_bearing_note: Carries broker handles only; raw secrets never render.

reset_action.action_label: Reset secret broker handles

header.canonical_source_note: Edit the profile source; effective and live connectivity views are inspect-only.
header.validator_summary: Connection profile validates and the last probe is current.

mode_switches.summary: Canonical connection source stays writable.
Effective connection profile includes policy and secret-handle narrowing.
Observed connectivity is live runtime state, not canonical text.

environment_layer_stack.summary: Connection layers stay visible from the profile editor and inspect path.

layers.secret_bearing_note: No secret material on this layer.

layers.secret_bearing_note: No secret material on this layer.

layers.secret_bearing_note: No secret material on this layer.

layers.secret_bearing_note: Carries credential handles only; raw credentials are excluded.

reset_action.action_label: Reset credential handles

header.canonical_source_note: Edit the API profile source; effective and live rows remain inspect-only.
header.validator_summary: Profile resolves, but policy pins outbound routing and auth posture.

mode_switches.summary: Canonical API profile source stays writable.
Effective profile resolves request defaults, policy, and secret-handle layers.
Live mode shows observed service posture and never implies writable source text.

environment_layer_stack.summary: Profile layers stay visible from the editor, CLI inspect, and send review.

layers.secret_bearing_note: No secret material on this layer.

reset_action.action_label: Reset workspace profile file

layers.secret_bearing_note: No secret material on this layer; ignored because policy route wins.

layers.secret_bearing_note: No secret material on this layer.

layers.secret_bearing_note: Carries broker handles only.

header.canonical_source_note: Edit the runtime manifest source; effective and live kernel rows remain inspect-only.
header.validator_summary: Resolver matched a runtime, but the active kernel session is reconnecting.

mode_switches.summary: Manifest source remains the canonical writable truth.
Effective runtime choice combines authored kernelspec intent and runtime discovery.
Live kernel state is unresolved while the session reattaches.

environment_layer_stack.summary: Kernel resolution layers stay visible from the manifest and inspector surfaces.

layers.secret_bearing_note: No secret material on this layer.

reset_action.action_label: Reset workspace kernelspec

layers.secret_bearing_note: No secret material on this layer.

reset_action.action_label: Inspect reset limits for policy runtime floor

layers.secret_bearing_note: No secret material on this layer; derived from runtime discovery.

reset_action.action_label: Inspect reset limits for interpreter discovery

layers.secret_bearing_note: No secret material on this layer; ignored until reattach completes.

reset_action.action_label: Inspect reset limits for observed kernel session

header.canonical_source_note: Edit the preview config source; effective and live preview rows stay inspect-only and visibly narrower than stable.
header.validator_summary: Preview runtime validates, but this row stays explicitly preview-scoped.

mode_switches.summary: Preview source remains the canonical editable object.
Effective preview projection includes managed overrides and runtime discovery.
Live preview capture is stale and remains labeled rather than masquerading as current source.

environment_layer_stack.summary: Preview runtime layers stay visible from the preview inspector and publish review.

layers.secret_bearing_note: No secret material on this layer.

reset_action.action_label: Reset workspace preview config

layers.secret_bearing_note: No secret material on this layer.

reset_action.action_label: Inspect reset limits for policy preview floor

layers.secret_bearing_note: Carries redacted placeholders only.

reset_action.action_label: Inspect reset limits for managed preview override

layers.secret_bearing_note: No secret material on this layer; derived from preview runtime inspection.

reset_action.action_label: Inspect reset limits for runtime discovery

header.canonical_source_note: Edit the workflow bundle manifest source; effective and runtime views remain inspect-only.
header.validator_summary: Bundle manifest validates and dependency markers remain explicit.

mode_switches.summary: Workflow bundle manifest source is the canonical writable truth.
Effective bundle view expands imported defaults and policy markers.
Live execution state is deferred until the bundle runs.

environment_layer_stack.summary: Bundle environment layers stay visible from bundle review and runtime inspect surfaces.

layers.secret_bearing_note: No secret material on this layer.

reset_action.action_label: Reset imported profile baseline

layers.secret_bearing_note: No secret material on this layer.

reset_action.action_label: Reset bundle manifest source

layers.secret_bearing_note: No secret material on this layer.

reset_action.action_label: Inspect reset limits for policy execution floor

layers.secret_bearing_note: No secret material on this layer; derived from bundle runtime selection.

reset_action.action_label: Inspect reset limits for runtime discovery

header.canonical_source_note: Edit the CI descriptor source; effective and mirrored observation modes are inspect-only.
header.target_context_label: Repo release pipeline / CI mirror lane
header.validator_summary: Mirror-backed CI inspection is stale and remains labeled as such.

mode_switches.summary: CI descriptor source remains the canonical writable truth.
Effective CI projection includes policy and managed overrides.
Mirrored CI observation is inspect-only and visibly stale.

environment_layer_stack.summary: CI layers stay visible from plan, diff, and support surfaces without leaving the IDE.

layers.secret_bearing_note: No secret material on this layer.

reset_action.action_label: Reset repo descriptor source

layers.secret_bearing_note: No secret material on this layer.

reset_action.action_label: Inspect reset limits for policy gate

layers.secret_bearing_note: Carries redacted placeholders only.

reset_action.action_label: Inspect reset limits for managed ci overlay

layers.secret_bearing_note: No secret material on this layer; derived from mirrored CI observation.

reset_action.action_label: Inspect reset limits for mirror snapshot

header.canonical_source_note: Edit the infrastructure descriptor source; effective and mirrored live modes remain inspect-only.
header.validator_summary: Target context is current; mirrored live overlay remains inspect-only.

mode_switches.summary: Infrastructure descriptor source remains the canonical writable truth.
Effective descriptor view keeps rendered and planned truth separate from source.
Live overlay is mirrored observation only and never canonical source text.

environment_layer_stack.summary: Infrastructure layers stay visible from target-context, plan, and support surfaces.

layers.secret_bearing_note: No secret material on this layer.

reset_action.action_label: Reset repo descriptor source

layers.secret_bearing_note: No secret material on this layer.

reset_action.action_label: Inspect reset limits for policy environment floor

layers.secret_bearing_note: Carries redacted placeholders only.

reset_action.action_label: Inspect reset limits for managed environment overlay

layers.secret_bearing_note: No secret material on this layer; derived from mirrored cluster observation.

reset_action.action_label: Inspect reset limits for observed resource overlay

header.canonical_source_note: The signed policy bundle is canonical; this local overlay surface is review-only.
header.target_context_label: Org policy cache / managed policy lane
header.validator_summary: Signed policy narrowing is current and visibly locked.

mode_switches.summary: Signed policy source is reviewable locally but not editable as ordinary text.
Effective policy overlay shows the narrowed result without implying user ownership.

mode_switches.resolution_time_label: No live mode for signed policy overlays
mode_switches.summary: Managed policy overlays do not claim a separate live text mode.

header.canonical_source_note: The signed bundle envelope is canonical; local review surfaces are inspect-only.
header.target_context_label: Admin policy import review / signed bundle cache
header.validator_summary: Signer, scope, digest, and expiry state are inspectable before apply.

mode_switches.summary: Signed bundle envelope is the authored source object under review.
Effective mode shows the exact policy narrowing the bundle would apply.

mode_switches.resolution_time_label: No live text mode for signed policy bundles
mode_switches.summary: Signed policy bundles do not expose a separate live text projection.

header.canonical_source_note: The signed entitlement snapshot is canonical; local review and grace handling are inspect-only.
header.target_context_label: Offline entitlement cache / managed feature gate
header.validator_summary: Snapshot is within grace and remains visibly narrower than live managed authority.

mode_switches.summary: Signed entitlement snapshot stays reviewable as the source object.
Effective mode shows grace-window posture and any narrowed managed capability state.

mode_switches.resolution_time_label: Live managed entitlement unavailable while offline
mode_switches.summary: Offline entitlement snapshots do not claim a live managed text projection.

header.canonical_source_note: The signed emergency bundle is canonical; local surfaces review its effect but do not edit it as ordinary text.
header.target_context_label: Emergency policy review / signed bundle cache
header.validator_summary: Emergency ratchet is active and remains explicitly reviewable.

mode_switches.summary: Signed emergency-disable envelope is the authored source object under review.
Effective mode shows the narrowed or disabled state without implying user-owned settings.

mode_switches.resolution_time_label: No separate live text mode for emergency bundles
mode_switches.summary: Emergency bundles do not advertise a live text projection beyond the effective ratchet.

header.canonical_source_note: The signed trust-root or signer-update bundle is canonical; local review surfaces stay inspect-only.
header.validator_summary: Rotation window and overlap state are inspectable before import.

mode_switches.summary: Signed trust-root update envelope is the authored source object under review.
Effective mode shows which trust roots and signers would remain trusted after import.

mode_switches.resolution_time_label: No separate live text mode for trust-root updates
mode_switches.summary: Trust-root updates do not claim a separate live text projection.
